nasb.text: When the grass disappears, the new growth is seen, And the herbs of the mountains are gathered in,

esv.text: When the grass is gone and the new growth appears and the vegetation of the mountains is gathered,

cnv.text: 乾草割去，嫩草又出現， 山上的野草也都收集起來。

ccb.text: 干草割去，嫩草长出， 山间的野草都被收起来。

csbs.text: 干草割去，嫩草出现， 山上的牧草被收取；
